Global wise it will take time for us to come to exact predictions. One day I will not be
surprised that varsha pravesh chart for the world will be put instead of the countries alone.
My favorite method is varsha pravesh –
If the 4th lord in 6 8 12 in the tajika chart of 1947 Indian independence horoscope then
rains will be deficient and there can be droughts.
